title: JESUH THU THEI SEMSEM NUAM INGH

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A thu zaza nuam ing
A thu zaza nuam ing
Kei tang a si Pa hong itna
A cing zaw in
ka thei nuam ta.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh thu ken sinsin nuam ingh.
A deihna khen tel thei nuam ingh.
Pasian Kha Siangtho ka
sia pa’n
Khris zia le tong hong lak khia ta’n

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh kammal zaza nuam ingh.
Topa tawh holim den nuam ingh.
A aw ngai ning vai khempeuh
ah,
A gen teng ka pom nuam ta.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Van tokhom ah a tutna thu,
Van hauhna teng a neihna thu;
A gam zai na’ng leh hong
pai na’ng
Za nuam ing, Kumpi a suah na’ng.
